subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Although your letter was detailed, necessity compelleth that the response be brief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء هر چند نامه شما مفصل بود ولی جواب بناچاری مختصر داده میشود
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
